title: Senior Revenue Manager at Goibibo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Goibibo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Goibibo Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Goibibo Hotels:
Goibibo Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Hotels!
